title: HGYZE Baby Hangers for Kids Clothes Closet, Adjustable Infant Baby Coat Hangers 0-12 Months, 20pcs Extendable Toddler Hanger for Children Boy, Non-Slip Blue Nursery Hanger with White Bow
features: Highlights of Baby Clothes Hangers - The size of toddler hangers hook fits all closet rod -1.57 inches /4cm. Because HGYZE opening hook of junior hanger is larger and wider than ordinary bear child hanger.

Blue Boy Hangers Includes: 20 pack plastic 11" - 14.5" adjustable newborn hangers in set. Our blue and white kids hangers will fit all sizes from new birth to adult. Parents do NOT need to buy children hangers of different sizes.

Little Bow Hanger : The slot is great for pants/shorts, kids hangers are also wide enough to actually fit pants under a shirt or jacket hanging over. You don't have to clip these hangers onto the pants. Just stick them inside the waist band, and they're snugly fit on the hanger in seconds.

Maximize your closet space: Unclutter your son's closet and add up to 50 percent more space with the ultra-thin and space-saving hangers. The stackable design of toddler hangers creat a large amount of space - the hanging and organizing possibilities are endless of infants hangers.

Save Matching Time: The stackable bow hook makes you to hang a jacket with the matching pants, ties or hats together. Our cute hangers can hold up to 11 pounds, making them ideal for hanging everything from onesies and overalls to winter coats and summer dresses.

Non-Slip and NO Wrinkles: Prevent Slippery design on edge-side. Idea for preventing outfits or skirts slipped. Also can hang clothing such as braces skits, underwear, ect. And the shoulders of ganchos de ropa para bebe will not wrinkle and warp when hanging because of widened design on both sides.
description: Product Description Baby Hangers for Closet Our Baby Clothes Hangers the opening hook of junior hanger is larger and wider than ordinary littler bear hanger. Space-saving cascading hanger. The stackable design of the toddler hanger creates a lot of space. The bow hooks allow you to pair your top with matching bottom. To Support 15 lbs - newborn coat hanger with hook for nursery. Kid Hangers for Nursery Adjustable baby clothes hangers Our baby hangers can keep the shape of the clothes very well,and it is sturdy and durable,kids clothes will not slip off easily,and thick clothes for children can also be hung safely.The standard size of toddler hangers can hang baby clothes from 0-18 years old,and the appropriate size can be adjust according to the age of newborn baby. Child hangers for girl room The hangers for baby clothes are made of safe and odor-free high-quality pp materials,so there is no need to worry about any impact on baby. Product information Size：6.69 ×11 inch ~ 6.69× 14.57 inch High quality PP material Robust and durable Stackable Adjustable Pant Bar Multifunctional hook The plastic clothes hanger is suitable for children's clothes for nursery and family. Non-Slip baby clothes will not slip off easily,and thick clothes for children can also be hung safely Stackable Our children clothes rack can be folded and hung, saving a lot of space and organizing your wardrobe easily Adjustable They will fit all sizes from new birth to adult/ girl & boy. Parents do NOT need to buy children hangers of different sizes. Multifunctional adjustable hanger Plastic children tubular hangers are lightweight, but thick enough to hang 0~18 years old clothing, You don't need to buy other hangers for your children Pink Plastic Hangers Our kids hangers for clothing with non-slip notch on the shoulder pad to prevent suit from slipping off kids hangers. The hooks and clips are also adjustable,which can prevent the hanger from being blown off by the wind. It's suitable for jackets, pants, shirts, dresses, etc. Colorful hangers for your son and daughter Blue hangers Grey hangers White hangers Pink hangers
